article.description: — De'Aaron Fox scored 29 points, and the San Antonio Spurs defeated the Oklahoma City Thunder 117-102 on Thursday for their third win over the defending NBA champs in the past two weeks.
article.headline: Spurs beat Thunder 117-102 for 3rd win over defending NBA champs in 2 weeks

images.name: Wemby lets Chet hear it after missed FT

keywords: San Antonio Spurs @ Oklahoma City Thunder
article.linkText: Spurs beat Thunder 117-102 for 3rd win over defending NBA champs in 2 weeks
article.story: OKLAHOMA CITY -- — De'Aaron Fox scored 29 points, and the San Antonio Spurs defeated the Oklahoma City Thunder 117-102 on Thursday for their third win over the defending NBA champs in the past two weeks. The Spurs also defeated the Thunder in an NBA Cup semifinal on Dec. 13 and in San Antonio on Tuesday. The teams meet again on Jan. 13 in Oklahoma City. Victor Wembanyama had 19 points and 11 rebounds and Stephon Castle had 19 points and seven assists for the Spurs (23-7). San Antonio shot 53.6% from the field and held the Thunder to 38.9% shooting. It was San Antonio's eighth straight win and Oklahoma City's first home loss of the season. The Thunder entered the day at the top of the Western Conference standings, with the Spurs in second. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 22 points, but the reigning league MVP made just 7 of 19 field goals. He scored at least 20 points for the 102nd consecutive game. Isaiah Hartenstein had 13 points and 12 rebounds and Chet Holmgren added 10 points and 12 rebounds for the Thunder. Oklahoma City started the season 24-1, tied for the league's all-time best record through 25 games. The Thunder are 2-4 since, including the three losses to the Spurs. The Thunder made their first seven field goals and went up 18-12 before Fox helped the Spurs fight back. His 21 points in the first half helped San Antonio head into the break with a 69-60 lead. The Spurs pushed the lead to 85-68 midway through the third quarter, and a dunk by Dylan Harper late in the third quarter put the Spurs up 91-74. The Spurs led 95-79 at the end of the period and maintained control from there. Up next Spurs: Host the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Thunder: Host the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

videos.description: Spurs impress again vs. the Thunder as they take down the defending champs on the road.
videos.headline: Spurs beat Thunder for third straight time

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Spurs beat Thunder for third straight time) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: De'Aaron Fox fakes out Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and knocks down a three-pointer.
videos.headline: De'Aaron Fox knocks down a three for the Spurs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (De'Aaron Fox knocks down a three for the Spurs) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Williams throws it up for Isaiah Hartenstein to slam it down.
videos.headline: Jalen Williams finds Isaiah Hartenstein for the Thunder alley-oop

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Williams finds Isaiah Hartenstein for the Thunder alley-oop) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Williams knocks down the 3-pointer with a hand in his face.
videos.headline: Jalen Williams hits the trey for OKC

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Williams hits the trey for OKC) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama knocks down the jumper for the Spurs plus a foul.
videos.headline: Wemby gets the bucket plus a foul

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby gets the bucket plus a foul) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren rocks the rim with slam
videos.headline: Chet Holmgren rocks the rim with slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Holmgren rocks the rim with slam) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama elevates for the big-time block
videos.headline: Victor Wembanyama denies Oklahoma City Thunder with stuff

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Victor Wembanyama denies Oklahoma City Thunder with stuff) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander gets downhill and gets the lay plus the foul.
videos.headline: SGA gets the and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA gets the and-1 to fall) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephon Castle throws the alley-oop to Luke Kornet to extend Spurs' lead.
videos.headline: Stephon Castle finds Luke Kornet for the slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Stephon Castle finds Luke Kornet for the slam) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Dylan Harper gets up for the beautiful slam dunk
videos.headline: Dylan Harper throws down powerful flush vs. Oklahoma City Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dylan Harper throws down powerful flush vs. Oklahoma City Thunder) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Harrison Barnes sidesteps his defender and lays it up over Chet Holmgren.
videos.headline: Harrison Barnes Eurosteps to a nice layup for Spurs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Harrison Barnes Eurosteps to a nice layup for Spurs) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Keldon Johnson soars for a putback jam to end the third quarter on a high note for the Spurs.
videos.headline: Keldon Johnson throws down emphatic putback jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Keldon Johnson throws down emphatic putback jam) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Williams gets help from Isaiah Hartenstein for an open layup to cut into the Spurs' lead.
videos.headline: Jalen Williams gets the layup in transition for OKC

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Williams gets the layup in transition for OKC) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Isaiah Joe uses the screen and knocks down a three to trim the Spurs' lead.
videos.headline: Isaiah Joe knocks down a big 3-pointer for OKC

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Joe knocks down a big 3-pointer for OKC) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama fumbles the ball, but is able to get the basket for the Spurs while falling down.
videos.headline: Wemby scores while falling to the ground

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby scores while falling to the ground) 2025/12/25 ESHEET
